// VERZUS M7.1 MATCH OPERATIONS FOUNDATION

import type {
  MatchClockSnapshot,
  MatchOperationAction,
  MatchOperationsViewModel,
  MatchOperationState,
  MatchOperationTone,
} from "../model/match-operations.types";
import { matchOperationStateLabels } from "../model/match-operations.state";
import { formatMatchServerTime } from "../model/match-clock.policy";
import { buildMatchTimeline } from "../model/match-timeline";

const primary = (label: string, disabled = true): MatchOperationAction => ({
  label,
  tone: "primary",
  disabled,
});

const secondary = (label: string, disabled = false): MatchOperationAction => ({
  label,
  tone: "secondary",
  disabled,
});

const danger = (label: string, disabled = true): MatchOperationAction => ({
  label,
  tone: "danger",
  disabled,
});

type Presentation = Pick<
  MatchOperationsViewModel,
  | "title"
  | "description"
  | "timerLabel"
  | "timerCaption"
  | "primaryAction"
  | "secondaryAction"
  | "score"
  | "resultNote"
  | "xpEarned"
  | "disputeId"
> & {
  tone: MatchOperationTone;
  homeCheckedIn: boolean;
  awayCheckedIn: boolean;
  homeReady: boolean;
  awayReady: boolean;
};

const presentations: Record<MatchOperationState, Presentation> = {
  scheduled: {
    tone: "neutral",
    title: "Match scheduled",
    description:
      "Your match is locked in. Return when the server-controlled check-in window opens.",
    timerLabel: "2D 06H 24M",
    timerCaption: "Until match start · server time",
    primaryAction: null,
    secondaryAction: secondary("View competition"),
    score: null,
    resultNote: null,
    xpEarned: null,
    disputeId: null,
    homeCheckedIn: false,
    awayCheckedIn: false,
    homeReady: false,
    awayReady: false,
  },
  "check-in-unavailable": {
    tone: "neutral",
    title: "Check-in unavailable",
    description:
      "Check-in opens 30 minutes before match time. The client countdown is display-only.",
    timerLabel: "00H 25M 14S",
    timerCaption: "Until check-in opens · server time",
    primaryAction: primary("Check in", true),
    secondaryAction: secondary("View details"),
    score: null,
    resultNote: null,
    xpEarned: null,
    disputeId: null,
    homeCheckedIn: false,
    awayCheckedIn: false,
    homeReady: false,
    awayReady: false,
  },
  "check-in-open": {
    tone: "success",
    title: "Check-in is open",
    description:
      "Confirm your presence before the deadline. Duplicate clicks must resolve to one event.",
    timerLabel: "00H 24M 13S",
    timerCaption: "Check-in ends · server time",
    primaryAction: primary("Check in"),
    secondaryAction: secondary("View details"),
    score: null,
    resultNote: null,
    xpEarned: null,
    disputeId: null,
    homeCheckedIn: false,
    awayCheckedIn: false,
    homeReady: false,
    awayReady: false,
  },
  "checked-in": {
    tone: "success",
    title: "You are checked in",
    description: "Your presence is persisted. Waiting for the opponent to complete check-in.",
    timerLabel: "00H 24M 13S",
    timerCaption: "Auto-cancel if opponent misses deadline",
    primaryAction: null,
    secondaryAction: secondary("Match chat"),
    score: null,
    resultNote: null,
    xpEarned: null,
    disputeId: null,
    homeCheckedIn: true,
    awayCheckedIn: false,
    homeReady: false,
    awayReady: false,
  },
  "opponent-not-checked-in": {
    tone: "danger",
    title: "Opponent not checked in",
    description:
      "Your check-in is safe. The server will apply the match policy when the deadline expires.",
    timerLabel: "00H 12M 45S",
    timerCaption: "Until opponent deadline · server time",
    primaryAction: null,
    secondaryAction: secondary("Match chat"),
    score: null,
    resultNote: null,
    xpEarned: null,
    disputeId: null,
    homeCheckedIn: true,
    awayCheckedIn: false,
    homeReady: false,
    awayReady: false,

  "both-ready": {
    tone: "success",
    title: "Both players are ready",
    description: "Check-in is complete. The lobby becomes available when the server opens it.",
    timerLabel: "04:12",
    timerCaption: "Until lobby opens · server time",
    primaryAction: primary("Open lobby"),
    secondaryAction: secondary("View details"),
    score: null,
    resultNote: null,
    xpEarned: null,
    disputeId: null,
    homeCheckedIn: true,
    awayCheckedIn: true,
    homeReady: true,
    awayReady: true,
  },
  "lobby-open": {
    tone: "info",
    title: "Lobby is open",
    description: "Join with the server-issued code, confirm readiness and keep support available.",
    timerLabel: "07:48",
    timerCaption: "Until scheduled start · server time",
    primaryAction: primary("I'm ready"),
    secondaryAction: secondary("Leave lobby"),
    score: null,
    resultNote: null,
    xpEarned: null,
    disputeId: null,
    homeCheckedIn: true,
    awayCheckedIn: true,
    homeReady: true,
    awayReady: true,
  },
  "in-progress": {
    tone: "danger",
    title: "Match in progress",
    description:
      "The match clock is informational. Report blocking issues without leaving the route.",
    timerLabel: "12:34",
    timerCaption: "Elapsed time",
    primaryAction: danger("Report issue"),
    secondaryAction: null,
    score: null,
    resultNote: null,
    xpEarned: null,
    disputeId: null,
    homeCheckedIn: true,
    awayCheckedIn: true,
    homeReady: true,
    awayReady: true,

  "submit-result": {
    tone: "info",
    title: "Submit final result",
    description:
      "Result mutation will validate the latest match version before accepting the score.",

    description: "Admin review is pending. Evidence remains separate from result submission.",

    tone: "warning",
    title: "Match forfeited",
    description: "The opponent receives the win according to the authoritative match policy.",
    timerLabel: "0 - 3",
    timerCaption: "Forfeited result",
    primaryAction: null,
    secondaryAction: secondary("View details"),
    score: { home: 0, away: 3 },
    resultNote: "Forfeited May 24, 2025 · 7:45 PM",
    xpEarned: null,
    disputeId: null,
    homeCheckedIn: true,
    awayCheckedIn: true,
    homeReady: true,
    awayReady: true,
  },
  cancelled: {
    tone: "neutral",
    title: "Match cancelled",
    description:
      "This match will not count. The cancellation reason remains visible and auditable.",
    timerLabel: null,
    timerCaption: null,
    primaryAction: null,
    secondaryAction: secondary("View details"),
    score: null,
    resultNote: "Reason: organiser cancelled",
    xpEarned: null,
    disputeId: null,
    homeCheckedIn: false,
    awayCheckedIn: false,
    homeReady: false,
    awayReady: false,
  },
  completed: {
    tone: "success",
    title: "Match completed",
    description: "The final score, progression and placement impact are now available.",
    timerLabel: "3 - 1",
    timerCaption: "Final score",
    primaryAction: null,
    secondaryAction: secondary("View summary"),
    score: { home: 3, away: 1 },
    resultNote: "Completed May 24, 2025 · 7:46 PM",
    xpEarned: 75,
    disputeId: null,
    homeCheckedIn: true,
    awayCheckedIn: true,
    homeReady: true,
    awayReady: true,
  },
};

export function getMatchOperationsMock(
  matchId: string,
  state: MatchOperationState,
  clock: MatchClockSnapshot,
): MatchOperationsViewModel {
  const presentation = presentations[state];

  return {
    id: matchId,
    state,
    stateLabel: matchOperationStateLabels[state],
    stateTone: presentation.tone,
    competitionName: "VERZUS Weekly Open",
    roundLabel: "Week 3 · Round 4",
    gameLabel: "EA FC 25",
    formatLabel: "1v1 · Best of 5",
    scheduledAtLabel: "Sat, May 24, 2025 · 7:00 PM EDT",
    serverTimeLabel: `Server time ${formatMatchServerTime(clock.serverNow)} UTC`,
    lobbyCode: "7X4B-5K2Q",
    matchVersion: clock.matchVersion,
    clock,
    home: {
      id: "rebels-united",
      name: "Rebels United",
      handle: "@rebelsunited",
      rankLabel: "Your team · #07",
      emblem: "rebels",
      sideLabel: "Home",
      checkedIn: presentation.homeCheckedIn,
      ready: presentation.homeReady,
    },
    away: {
      id: "apex-predators",
      name: "Apex Predators",
      handle: "@apexpredators",
      rankLabel: "Opponent · #11",
      emblem: "apex",
      sideLabel: "Away",
      checkedIn: presentation.awayCheckedIn,
      ready: presentation.awayReady,
    },
    title: presentation.title,
    description: presentation.description,
    timerLabel: presentation.timerLabel,
    timerCaption: presentation.timerCaption,
    primaryAction: presentation.primaryAction,
    secondaryAction: presentation.secondaryAction,
    score: presentation.score,
    resultNote: presentation.resultNote,
    xpEarned: presentation.xpEarned,
    disputeId: presentation.disputeId,
    timeline: buildMatchTimeline(state, clock),
  };
}
